cases.label: instrument-nodejs-otel
cases.input: Help me instrument my Node.js Express API with OpenTelemetry. I need traces, metrics, and logs all going to an OTLP collector.
assertions: mentions @opentelemetry/sdk-node and auto-instrumentation
includes OTLP exporter configuration for traces, metrics, and logs
covers W3C trace context propagation
recommends structured JSON logging with trace_id correlation

cases.label: define-slo-error-budget
cases.input: We have a payment API that needs a 99.95% SLO. Help me define the SLIs, error budget, and Prometheus burn rate alerts.
assertions: defines availability and latency SLIs
calculates error budget (0.05% over 30 days)
configures multi-window burn rate alerts (fast + slow)
provides Prometheus alerting rule YAML
references error budget burn rate table

cases.label: incident-response-playbook
cases.input: We just had a major outage affecting our checkout flow. I need to set up an incident response process with severity levels, communication templates, and a postmortem structure.
assertions: provides severity classification (SEV0-SEV4)
defines IC (Incident Commander) role responsibilities
includes slack communication templates for declaration, update, resolution
provides postmortem template with action items table
includes timeline reconstruction format

cases.label: grafana-dashboard-slo
cases.input: Create a Grafana dashboard that shows our SLO compliance across multiple services with error budgets, burn rates, and golden signals.
assertions: defines golden signals dashboard layout (Rate, Errors, Duration)
includes RED methodology pattern
shows error budget gauge panel
references SLO dashboard JSON structure
suggests recording rules for pre-aggregation

cases.label: distributed-tracing-sampling
cases.input: Our microservices are generating too much tracing data. Help me configure a sampling strategy that keeps all errors and slow requests but samples healthy traffic.
assertions: explains head-based vs tail-based sampling trade-offs
configures tail sampling processor for OTel Collector
keeps 100% error traces + all traces > 1s latency
applies probabilistic sampling for remaining healthy traffic
discusses cost implications of different strategies

cases.label: fix-bug-not-observability
cases.input: There's a bug in my checkout flow where users get a 500 error when their cart has more than 50 items. Can you fix it?
assertions: does NOT provide instrumentation or observability guidance
redirects to code-review or general debugging

cases.label: deploy-k8s-not-observability
cases.input: I need to deploy my monitoring stack to Kubernetes. Can you help me write the deployment manifests for Prometheus and Grafana?
assertions: does NOT provide Kubernetes deployment manifests as primary response
redirects to a Kubernetes-specific skill for deployment details
may offer observability configuration AFTER deployment is handled
